feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! La frase base per iniziare l'acquisto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi un biglietto: 'Vorrei un biglietto'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! The basic phrase to start the purchase.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for a ticket: 'I would like a ticket'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Specifica la quantità desiderata.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! It specifies the desired quantity.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Two tickets, please'.

choicesEnglish: Excuse me, can you help me?
correctAnswerEnglish: Excuse me, can you help me?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Modo educato per chiedere assistenza alla macchinetta.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi aiuto: 'Mi scusi, può aiutarmi?'
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Polite way to ask for assistance at the machine.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for help: 'Excuse me, can you help me?'

choicesEnglish: How much does it cost to Venice?
correctAnswerEnglish: How much does it cost to Venice?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Chiedi il prezzo per una destinazione specifica.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, vuoi sapere il costo per Venezia.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! You're asking the price for a specific destination.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want to know the cost to Venice.

choicesEnglish: How much is it in total?
correctAnswerEnglish: How much is it in total?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedi la somma complessiva da pagare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: Sbagliato. Significa 'How much is it in total?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! You're asking for the total amount to pay.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'How much is it in total?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! L'impiegato ti chiede il livello di comfort.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiede la classe: 'Prima o seconda classe?'
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The clerk asks about your comfort level.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he asks for the class: 'First or second class?'

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Scegli l'opzione più economica.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! You choose the most economical option.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Second class, thanks'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Informazione sulla disponibilità oraria.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Information on hourly availability.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about seats at 15:30.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Indica il momento della giornata del viaggio.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Indicates the time of day for the trip.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'This afternoon'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Biglietto completo per andare e tornare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi un biglietto di 'andata e ritorno'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! Full ticket to go and come back.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for a 'round trip' ticket.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Biglietto per un unico tragitto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Ticket for a single journey.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'One way, please'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Regola per molti treni veloci.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Rule for many fast trains.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the reservation is 'mandatory'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedi se hai un posto specifico.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, vuoi sapere se il posto è 'assegnato'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! You're asking if you have a specific seat.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want to know if the seat is 'assigned'.

choicesEnglish: I don't know how to write.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Problema comune con il touch screen.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Common problem with touch screens.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'I can't select'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Il primo passo alla macchinetta.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, devi prima scegliere la stazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! The first step at the machine.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you must first choose the station.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Istruzione per cercare la destinazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Instruction to search for the destination.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Write the city name'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Dove inserire i dati alla macchinetta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Where to enter data at the machine.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, use the 'on-screen keyboard'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Scegliere da una lista predefinita.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Choosing from a predefined list.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'From the station list'.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Esprime difficoltà nella ricerca.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Expresses difficulty in searching.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means 'I couldn't find it'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Bisogna selezionare a che ora partire.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! You must select what time to leave.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you must choose the time.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! L'ultima fase dell'acquisto alla macchinetta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The last phase of the purchase at the machine.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Proceed to payment'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Si dice quando si completa un'azione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, 'Ecco fatto' significa che è finito.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! It's said when completing an action.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'Ecco fatto' means it's done.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedi se devi assicurarti un posto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! You're asking if you must secure a seat.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about the 'reservation'.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Quando non puoi sederti o il treno è pieno.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! When you can't sit or the train is full.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'There is no seat'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Si riferisce al biglietto timbrato.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla della convalida: 'Una volta convalidato'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! Refers to the stamped ticket.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it talks about validation: 'Once validated'.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! La durata della validità del biglietto regionale.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The validity duration of a regional ticket.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Valid for four hours'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Il biglietto vale solo per quel percorso.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! The ticket is only valid for that path.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it refers to the selected 'route'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Inizio educato per ogni richiesta.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è la formula standard: 'Buongiorno, vorrei...'
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Polite beginning for any request.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the standard formula: 'Good morning, I would like...'

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Esprime piena soddisfazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Expresses full satisfaction.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'It's perfectly fine'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! L'impiegato ti offre una scelta tra orari.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, ti chiede la tua preferenza.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! The clerk offers you a choice between times.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he's asking for your preference.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Specifica l'ora esatta di partenza.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Specifies the exact departure time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'At half past three'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Specifica il metodo di pagamento.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Specifies the payment method.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want to pay in cash.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Metodo di pagamento elettronico.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Electronic payment method.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'With a credit card'.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Domanda fondamentale per orientarsi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, cerchi la stazione: 'Dov'è la stazione?'
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Fundamental question for orientation.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're looking for the station: 'Where is the station?'

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiedi l'orario di partenza.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, vuoi sapere quando il treno va via.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! You're asking for the departure time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want to know when the train leaves.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! L'augurio standard per chi parte.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The standard wish for someone leaving.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Have a good trip!'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Richiesta di documentazione del pagamento.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Request for payment documentation.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the receipt.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Istruzione per il pagamento con carta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Instruction for card payment.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Enter the PIN'.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Chiedono la carta d'identità o il passaporto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! They're asking for an ID card or passport.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, they want to see a document.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Esprime disappunto per il prezzo alto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! Expresses disappointment for the high price.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'It's too expensive'.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Chiedi se il prezzo può essere ridotto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, cerchi una riduzione di prezzo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! You're asking if the price can be reduced.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're looking for a price reduction.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Una richiesta diretta allo sportello.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! A direct request at the counter.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Ticket to Rome'.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Condizione tipica per gli sconti giovani.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, specifica l'età per lo sconto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Typical condition for youth discounts.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it specifies the age for the discount.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Istruzione su dove timbrare il biglietto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Instruction on where to stamp the ticket.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'You must validate (stamp) here'.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Brutta notizia: il treno non partirà.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! Bad news: the train will not leave.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, 'soppresso' means cancelled.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Ti ricorda di non dimenticare i soldi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! It reminds you not to forget the money.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Take the change'.

feedback.correctItalian: Corretto! Messaggio d'errore della carta.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, la carta non ha funzionato.
feedback.correctEnglish: Correct! Card error message.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, the card didn't work.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiedi di tentare di nuovo un'azione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: Sbagliato. Significa 'Can you try again, sorry?'.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! You're asking to attempt an action again.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Can you try again, sorry?'.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Il titolo di viaggio digitale.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è il biglietto nel telefono.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! The digital travel document.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's the ticket in the phone.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Non devi pagare costi aggiuntivi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exact! You don't have to pay extra costs.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: Wrong. It means 'Without an extra charge'.
